data.content: Now let me try downloading debug symbols from the Microsoft symbol server for each library. I'll try multiple URL formats.

arguments.command:
mkdir -p /tmp/symbols && cd /tmp/symbols

# Try downloading debug symbols for libmonosgen-2.0.so
BUILDID="1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be"
FILE="libmonosgen-2.0.so"

# Try various symbol server URL formats
for fmt in \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/${FILE}/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/${FILE}" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/${FILE}/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/${FILE}" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/${FILE}.dbg/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/${FILE}.dbg" \
  "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/_.debug/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/_.debug"; do
  echo "Trying: $fmt"
  HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -L "$fmt")
  echo "  -> HTTP $HTTP_CODE"
  if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then
    echo "  -> SUCCESS, downloading..."
    curl -sS -L -o "${FILE}.sym" "$fmt"
    file "${FILE}.sym"
    break
  fi
done
